text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it's no good. How am I even supposed to
practice being sincere?
choice_data_list:
(She's trying to practice how to be more
sincere?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that reminds me of the advice Tamamo
Cross gave her when they were discussing what to
get Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Narita Taishin's going to repay Super Creek's
kindness by expressing her feelings more
sincerely? That's pretty commendable.
choice_data_list: Do you need help with being sincere?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you butting in for? This has
nothing to do with—wait, were you
eavesdropping on me?
choice_data_list: Sorry, you seemed pretty vexed, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A-as if! Ugh, you're so... I mean, really!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Fine! So what if I was struggling? You actually
gonna help me out or something?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so you want to be more sincere... That
could be quite the endeavor.
choice_data_list:
I was thinking it'd be best to pair her up with
her best friends.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: H-her best friends? Like, BEST friends?! Taishin thinks we're besties?! Waaah, I'm so happy! Ohhh, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, shut it already! Let's just get this over with!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Expressing yourself is a part of being sincere. So
to help you with that, I consulted several quiz
books and came up with...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Answer in Earnest: Hayahide's Special True or
False Quiz!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's begin. Question number one—true or false?
You have previously attempted to eat an entire
extra-large serving of the cafeteria's daily special.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean, I was hungry...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Mhm... Challenging yourself is important, but you mustn't push your limits too hard. Next time you take on such a task, invite me along too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Question number two—true or false? You tend to
schedule your training sessions for when there
aren't many people around.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, there's nothing wrong with that, but you'd
be at greater risk if you got into an accident.
Always know when to ask others for help. Next...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec. How many more of these annoying
"life lessons" of yours do I have to listen to?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay, my turn! Ta-dah! Check it out—it's a cat
cafe!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Because, get this... Taishin really wants to talk to
cats!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you on about?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're not fooling me! I saw you hanging out with
your feline friend in that shopping district alley!
You had a whole conversation and everything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha—?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But you went quiet when people came around! I
think it'd be good for you to get comfy talking to
kitties even when others are watching!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Y-you saw me?! Hang on, that wasn't—I was just
talking to myself, not the cat!
choice_data_list: That doesn't sound like a very sincere answer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's right. If you're going to chat with a cat, you
have do it with an honest and open heart!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: An honest and open heart...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Forget this! It's impossible!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can be more sincere or open or
whatever! It's seriously making my skin crawl!
Dummies!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It seems you've finally revealed the true
feelings hidden in your heart.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Did it ever feel like Creek was forcing herself to
help you? Or going out of her way?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they looked a little worn, and you might hurt
yourself if they ripped, so I mended them!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: This is a super important time for me too, and I want us both to keep training and working hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I get it now... I just have to be honest with her...
That's all there is to it.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hang on. If you already knew what I needed to
do, why'd you make me jump through so many
hoops?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I meeean, it's not every day we get to see you
being honest! We couldn't resist! Right,
Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grrr! You two are SO dead!
choice_data_list: You sure have some great friends.
You sure have some great friends.
Next time, let's get those two to be sincere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grrr! You two are SO dead!
choice_data_list: You sure have some great friends.
You sure have some great friends.
Next time, let's get those two to be sincere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
With friends like these... Ugh! First they play me
like a fiddle, then they rub in the salt!
choice_data_list: They got you your answer though, right?
They got you your answer though, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess they helped a little.

text_block_list.name: Hayahide and Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But only a little! You barely even helped at all!
Geez...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, nice idea...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Let's start with you, Hayahide. Question number
one—and remember, be sincere.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
True or false? You think your hair looks good
today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Wait, are you saying it doesn't look good?!
